allow: Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh "I would like to check what is the best practice for keeping used versions in this project for example we have actions/checkout in so many places as version 4 now new version according to dependency bump is 6 I want to have a centralized approach to keep them in sync" --json --short-name "centralize-action-versions" "Centralize GitHub Actions Version Management")
